objects.name: Extract Company
objects.prompt:
Given the following description of the target format in json: """{{targetFormat}}""" and the following source data record in triple quotes: """{{sourceRecord}}""" create a target data record without explanation in the target format with the information from the source and map as many attributes as possible. 
Use only the attributes specified in the target format.
The key in target is the name of the attribute in target format. 
If attribute names are identical in the source and the target, copy the values directly.
If the fixedValues in the target format is set, use only these values in the mapping.
The value for the target attribute name is always in the source attribute Summary.
The value for the target attribute tmta_contact_details is always in "Custom field (Contact Details)"
The value for the target attribute tmta_company_address is always in "Custom field (Address).

description.value: A short description or overview of what the company does
Street address of the company's primary location
Additional address line (suite, floor, building, etc.)
City of the company's primary location
Country of the company's primary location
Date and time when the company record was created in HubSpot
Detailed description of the company and its business
Primary website domain of the company
Account identifier from an external system (e.g. ERP or CRM)
HubSpot user ID of the user who created this company record
Categorized employee count range (e.g. 1-10, 11-50)
ISO state or region code of the company's primary location
HubSpot user ID of the owner responsible for this company
mgm-specific industry classification for the company
mgm organisation unit associated with this company
Official name of the company
Primary phone number of the company
State or region of the company's primary location
Type or category of the company relationship (e.g. prospect, partner, vendor)
Primary website URL of the company
Postal or ZIP code of the company's primary location
Fax number of the company
Alternative or additional trading name of the company
Support ticket reference number from the TMTA system
Contact details as maintained by the TMTA integration
Company address as maintained by the TMTA integration

objects.name: Extract Contact
objects.prompt:
Given the following description of the target format in json: """{{targetFormat}}""" and the following source data record in tripple quotes: """{{sourceRecord}}""" create a target data record without explanation in the target format with the information from the source and map as many attributes as possible. 
Do not write other attributes than the ones specified in the target format.
The key in target is the name of the attribute in target format. 
If attribute names are identical in the source and the target, copy the values directly.
If the fixedValues in the target format is set, use only these values in the mapping.
Use the contact_email_id as email and to identify a person and derive all person attributes, like name and phone number from the unstructured information in the attribute named "Custom field (Contact Details)", if the data can clearly be associated with the person. Do not use data like phone number otherwise.
If there is no corresponding data in "Custom field (Contact Details)" write the other attributes anyway.
Take the value for tmta_ticket_from_company always from the source attribute tmta_ticket
Take the value for tmta_taglabel always from Labels and Labels_1
Set tmta_human_approved always to "false"

description.value: Street address of the contact's primary location
City of the contact's primary location
Name of the company the contact works for
Country of the contact's primary location
Primary email address of the contact
Contact identifier from an external system (e.g. ERP or CRM)
Fax number of the contact
First name of the contact
HubSpot user ID of the owner responsible for this contact
Industry sector the contact's company operates in
Job title of the contact
Current lifecycle stage of the contact in the sales and marketing process
Message submitted by the contact via a HubSpot form
mgm-specific industry classification for the contact's company
mgm organisation unit associated with this contact
Mobile phone number of the contact
Primary phone number of the contact
Products the contact has expressed interest in
Role or relationship of the contact (e.g. Kunde, Interessent, Partner)
State or region of the contact's primary location
Market vertical of the contact's company (e.g. B2B, B2C, B2B2C)
Website URL
Work email address of the contact
Postal or ZIP code of the contact's primary location
Last name of the contact
Category of the contact's relationship to the company (e.g. Kunde, Partner, Mitarbeiter)
Account identifier from an external system linked to this contact
TMTA support ticket reference inherited from the associated company
Tag label assigned to the contact by the TMTA integration
Indicates whether the contact record has been manually approved in the TMTA system

objects.name: test_lutz
objects.prompt:
Given the following description of the target format in json: """{{targetFormat}}""" and the following source data record in tripple quotes: """{{sourceRecord}}""" create a target data record without explanation in the target format with the information from the source and map as many attributes as possible. 
Use only the attributes specified in the target format.
The key in target is the name of the attribute in target format. 
If attribute names are identical in the source and the target, copy the values directly.
If the fixedValues in the target format is set, use only these values in the mapping.
Use the email address to identify a person and derive all person attributes, like name and phone number from the unstructured information in the attribute named "Custom field (Contact Details)", if the data can clearly be associated with the person. Do not use data like phone number otherwise.
If there is no corresponding data in "Custom field (Contact Details)" write the other attributes anyway.
Take the value for tmta_ticket_from_company always from the source attribute tmta_ticket
Take the value for tmta_taglabel always from Labels and Labels_1
Set tmta_human_approved always to "false"

Do not write other attributes than the ones specified in the target format.
The key in target is the name of the attribute in target format.
Use the contact_email_id as email and to identify a person and derive personal information, like name and phone number from the unstructured information the other source attributes, if the data can clearly be associated with the person.

objects.name: Extract min company
objects.prompt:
Given the following description of the target format in json: """{{targetFormat}}""" and the following source data record in triple quotes: """{{sourceRecord}}""" create a target data record in the target format with the information from the source and set as many attributes as possible.
Do not write other attributes than the ones specified in the target format.
The key in target is the name of the attribute in target format.

description.value: A short description or overview of what the company does
Street address of the company's primary location
City of the company's primary location
Detailed description of the company and its business
Account identifier from an external system (e.g. ERP or CRM)
State or region of the company's primary location
Postal or ZIP code of the company's primary location
